ideation: This animation sequence depicts two people holding hands.  It starts with both arms extended slightly forward and palms upward, then moves to a gentle hand-holding position. The final frame returns to a neutral position.  The motion is meant to be smooth and friendly.  Given the robot's lack of hands, the 'holding hands' will be represented by the palms facing each other and brought into close proximity.

frames.beat: arms reach forward, palms open and inviting
the palms meet and gently clasp in friendship
arms return to a relaxed, friendly stance
